overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a lush jungle environment, transitioning to rocky riverside terrain with a waterfall and ancient ruins in the background. A mechanical flying creature soars overhead as the character explores the prehistoric-futuristic landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle path with large tropical ferns

events.description: character stands up from crouching position and begins running forward

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs through dense jungle vegetation with large ferns and tropical plants surrounding the path

entered.detail: large green tropical ferns and broad leaves framing the dirt path
massive tree trunk with thick bark visible through the vegetation
tall rocky spires and mesas visible through the mist in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character crouching in dense jungle vegetation before standing and running forward along a narrow dirt trail. Large tropical ferns and ancient trees surround the path, with distant rock formations visible through the morning mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to misty waterfall with ancient ruins visible

events.description: exits dense jungle canopy into open rocky area with waterfall mist visible ahead
ground surface transitions from dirt trail to sandstone rock formations

agents.ego_description: character runs across uneven rocky terrain toward the misty waterfall area with increasing openness

entered.detail: white mist rising from waterfall at the base of the rocky cliffs
large smooth sandstone boulders and rock formations covering the ground
calm water pool at the base of the waterfall reflecting the sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense jungle into a wide-open rocky area approaching a waterfall. The ground transitions from dirt to large sandstone boulders, with mist rising from the water ahead and ancient ruins becoming visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverside with waterfall mist and ancient ruins backdrop

events.description: character slows and stops to look up toward the sky
large mechanical flying creature soars overhead casting a shadow on the rocks

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs along the riverside rocks then stops to observe a mechanical creature flying overhead before continuing

notable_agents.action: mechanical bird-like creature with red glowing components flying across the sky above the ruins

entered.detail: large mechanical bird with red accents and metal wings flying overhead
tall ancient skyscraper ruins silhouetted against the misty sky

segments.scene_description: The character traverses rocky terrain along the riverside with a waterfall creating mist in the background. Ancient ruins stand silhouetted against the sky. The character stops to watch a large mechanical flying creature soar overhead before continuing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path ascending back into forested area

events.description: character resumes running along the cliffside path moving away from the waterfall
path curves and ascends back into more densely vegetated forest area

agents.ego_description: character runs along the cliffside dirt path moving away from the waterfall toward the forested hills

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall with patches of moss and vegetation
dense forest of tall pine trees covering the distant hills

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along a cliffside dirt path that ascends away from the waterfall area. The mechanical creature and ruins disappear from view as the path curves back toward a forested area with tall pine trees visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a misty jungle into a vast, open riverside landscape. It begins with the character crouching amidst dense tropical ferns and ancient trees before standing to sprint forward along a narrow dirt trail. As the character moves, the surrounding vegetation gradually thins, allowing the morning mist to clear and reveal distant rock formations. The scene then opens wide as the dirt path gives way to large sandstone boulders, shifting the terrain from a lush forest to a rocky expanse. Finally, the camera pushes forward toward a rising mist from a nearby waterfall, with ancient ruins emerging in the distant background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a misty riverside landscape with ancient ruins into an ascending cliffside path leading toward a distant forest. It begins with the character traversing rocky terrain beside a waterfall, where the air is thick with mist and ruins are silhouetted against the sky. As the character pauses to watch a large mechanical flying creature soar overhead, the camera maintains its forward momentum along the river's edge. The scene then shifts as the character begins running up a dirt path that climbs away from the water, causing the ruins and the creature to fade from view. Finally, the path curves sharply, opening up a vista of tall pine trees in the distance as the environment transforms into a forested highland.
